title: Véronique Hunter
content:
Immigration and Compliance Technician
People.ContactEmail vhunter@mtiplus.ca
Véronique is an Immigration and Compliance Technician within MT❯i plus , our immigration law division at our Québec City office. She has worked in the immigration field since 2014.
In her role as compliance technician, she assists every team member in efficiently advancing our mandates and ensures that case files remain organized and manageable. Véronique has rich cross-border legal experience and  her studious knowledge of Canadian immigration and citizenship law privies her to accompany clients through a wide range of both simple and complex temporary residence, permanent residence, and citizenship mandates.
Véronique earned her Graduate Diploma in Immigration and Citizenship Law at Queen’s University. She also studied law in California after earning her Bachelor of Arts, and Associate in Arts degrees in liberal studies with high honors.
